---
title: "legend_block"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/stwd/src/branch/main/R/stwd.R#L857)

# `legend_block()`

Create a Legend Block Plot

## Usage

```r
legend_block(
  colors,
  halign = "right",
  valign = "center",
  orientation = "horizontal",
  sep = " | ",
  size = 10,
  bold = TRUE,
  uppercase = FALSE,
  lineheight = 1.6,
  width = 0.95,
  margin_top = 0,
  margin_bottom = 5,
  margin_left = 5,
  margin_right = 5,
  ...
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `colors` | Named vector where names are category labels and values are colors (hex codes or R color names). |
| `halign` | Horizontal alignment: "left", "center", or "right". Default: "right". |
| `valign` | Vertical alignment (for vertical orientation): "top", "center", or "bottom". Default: "center". |
| `orientation` | Either "horizontal" (labels side by side) or "vertical" (labels stacked). Default: "horizontal". |
| `sep` | Separator between category labels (horizontal only). Default: " \| ". |
| `size` | Text size in pts. Default: 10. |
| `bold` | Logical; make labels bold? Default: TRUE. |
| `uppercase` | Logical; convert labels to uppercase? Default: FALSE. |
| `lineheight` | Line height multiplier for vertical legends. Default: 1.6. |
| `width` | Text width for wrapping (0-1). Default: 0.95. |
| `margin_top` | Top margin in pts. Default: 0. |
| `margin_bottom` | Bottom margin in pts. Default: 5. |
| `margin_left` | Left margin in pts. Default: 5. |
| `margin_right` | Right margin in pts. Default: 5. |
| `...` | Additional arguments passed to `marquee::geom_marquee()`. |

## Value

A ggplot object that can be combined with other plots via patchwork.

## Description

Creates a standalone inline legend as a ggplot, showing colored category
labels separated by a delimiter. Use above/below charts or beside them
in patchwork compositions to replace traditional legends with clean text.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
library(patchwork)

legend_colors <- c("ACCURATE" = "#808080", "NULL" = "#B0B0B0", "ERROR" = "#E69F00")

# Horizontal above chart
legend_plot <- legend_block(legend_colors, halign = "right")

# Vertical beside chart
legend_vert <- legend_block(legend_colors, orientation = "vertical", valign = "top")

title_block("My Title") / legend_plot / my_chart +
    plot_layout(heights = c(0.08, 0.04, 0.88))

## End(Not run)
```
